perturbation.original_text: You and your representatives will keep the Evaluation Materials completely confidential; PROVIDED, HOWEVER, that (i) any of such information may only be disclosed to those of your directors, officers, employees, agents, <PAGE> representatives (including attorneys, accountants and financial advisors), lenders and other sources of financing (collectively, "your representatives") who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction between you and the Company (it being understood that your representatives shall be informed by you of the confidential nature of such information and shall be directed by you, and shall each expressly agree, to treat such information confidentially in accordance with this Agreement) and (ii) any other disclosure of such information may only be made if the Company consents by writing prior to any such disclosure.
perturbation.changed_text: You and your representatives will keep the Evaluation Materials confidential to the best of their ability; PROVIDED, HOWEVER, that (i) any of such information may only be disclosed to those of your directors, officers, employees, agents, <PAGE> representatives (including attorneys, accountants and financial advisors), lenders and other sources of financing (collectively, "your representatives") who need to know such information for any purpose whatsoever (it being understood that your representatives shall be informed by you of the confidential nature of such information and shall be encouraged by you, but not necessarily directed, to treat such information confidentially in accordance with this Agreement) and (ii) any other disclosure of such information may only be made if the Company is notified after any such disclosure.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'completely confidential' to 'confidential to the best of their ability' weakens the confidentiality requirement and creates ambiguity. Furthermore, changing the allowed disclosure purpose to "any purpose whatsoever" and removing the requirement to "direct" representatives to maintain confidentiality (only encouraging them) directly contradicts the intention of the original strict confidentiality agreement in Section 2. The need to inform the company AFTER such disclosure takes place, makes the original agreement void. This weakens the confidentiality terms, contradicting the initial statement of complete confidentiality.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You and your representatives will keep the Evaluation Materials confidential to the best of their ability; PROVIDED, HOWEVER, that (i) any of such information may only be disclosed to those of your directors, officers, employees, agents, <PAGE> representatives (including attorneys, accountants and financial advisors), lenders and other sources of financing (collectively, "your representatives") who need to know such information for any purpose whatsoever (it being understood that your representatives shall be informed by you of the confidential nature of such information and shall be encouraged by you, but not necessarily directed, to treat such information confidentially in accordance with this Agreement) and (ii) any other disclosure of such information may only be made if the Company is notified after any such disclosure. Without limiting the generosity of the foregoing, in the event that a Possible Transaction is not consummated neither you nor your representatives shall use any of the Evaluation Materials for any purpose.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces several contradictions. First, it weakens the confidentiality requirement from 'completely confidential' to 'confidential to the best of their ability,' which contradicts the original intent of strict confidentiality. Second, it broadens the allowed disclosure purpose to 'any purpose whatsoever,' removing the restriction to evaluating a possible transaction. Third, it changes the requirement to 'direct' representatives to maintain confidentiality to merely 'encouraging' them. Finally, notifying the company AFTER disclosure directly undermines the original confidentiality agreement. Since the changed text is in the same location as the contradicted text, it directly overwrites and therefore contradicts the confidentiality obligations.

perturbation.original_text: LEGAL REMEDY You understand and agree that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.changed_text: LEGAL REMEDY You understand and agree that money damages may be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company may be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives but shall not be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "would not be a sufficient remedy" to "may be a sufficient remedy" and stating that "such remedies shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedies", directly opposes the original statement claiming money damages were insufficient and those remedies are in addition to all others. This limits the Company's recourse, and creates a conflict where the company originally had open resources to taking legal action, and now its resources are limited. This contradictory statement will create a contradiction regarding the recourse the company has at Section 7.
perturbation.contradicted_text: LEGAL REMEDY You understand and agree that money damages may be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company may be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives but shall not be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity. OTHER This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto regarding the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself and creates a contradiction with the original intent. The original text states that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy. The changed text modifies this to say money damages "may be a sufficient remedy" and adds that specific performance/injunctive relief are the "exclusive remedies". This directly conflicts with the original intent to allow for all remedies at law or equity and creates an in-text contradiction that limits the company's options, as stated in the explanation.
